question.text: How many Recommendations does the FATF framework comprise, and into how many areas are they divided?

explanation.text:
**The Logic:** The FATF has 40 Recommendations divided into seven distinct areas: (1) AML/CFT Policies and coordination; (2) Money laundering and confiscation; (3) Terrorist financing and financing of proliferation; (4) Preventive measures; (5) Transparency and beneficial ownership; (6) Powers and responsibilities of competent authorities; and (7) International cooperation.
**The Trap:** The 40+9 format refers to the original 40 Recommendations plus 9 Special Recommendations on terrorist financing. These were consolidated into the current 40 Recommendations. Don't confuse 49 (40+9) with the current 40.
**Cross-Exam Context:** The 40 Recommendations structure is fundamental knowledge for IFSCA-01 and all AML-related certifications. Knowing the seven areas helps organize your understanding of the entire framework.
**Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Seven areas: Policies, ML/Confiscation, TF/PF, Prevention, Transparency, Authorities, International Cooperation. The 40+9 historical format (40 ML + 9 TF) was consolidated into today's 40 Recommendations.
